phrases.en: Oops. I'd better find a cash machine.
phrases.zh: 哎呀。我最好找一台取款机。

phrases.en: So she went to an ATM in the store.
phrases.zh: 于是她去了店里的一台自动取款机。

phrases.en: She took her cash card out of her purse.
phrases.zh: 她从钱包里拿出银行卡。

phrases.en: She lined up the magnetic strip properly.
And inserted the card into the slot on the ATM.
phrases.zh: 把卡插进取款机的卡槽里。

phrases.en: A message on the screen asked for her PIN.
phrases.zh: 屏幕上出现一条信息，要求输入她的密码。

phrases.en: So she entered her PIN by pressing keys on the keypad.
phrases.zh: 于是她按键盘上的按键输入了密码。

phrases.en: Then, she entered the amount of money she needed.
phrases.zh: 然后，她输入了所需的金额。
